chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-238 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 02.06.2023. Mr. Noor Nabi Samoo advocate for the applicants. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. Applicants are present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Complainant, who is an advocate, has alleged in FIR that applicants, on account of dispute over agricultural land, duly armed with weapons attacked him and his family on 01.03.2023 at about 0900 hours. Co-accused, Fateh Muhammad, armed with a gun, fired upon the complainant, but he saved himself by whisking himself behind a tree. Meanwhile, applicant Ghulam Shabbir caused iron rod blows to his sister-in-law Mst. Rashida and his cousin Mst. Sakina. The injuries sustained by both the victims are u/s 337-A(i) and 337-F(i) PPC, respectively, which are bailable. Therefore, learned Assistant PG has recorded no objection to confirmation of bail. Learned defence counsel has further informed that co-accused, Fateh Muhammad, has been granted post- arrest bail. In view of the above facts and circumstances, the bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicants vide order dated 16.03.2023 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
